allow: Bash(python -c "import pygame_gui; print\(''Version:'', pygame_gui.__version__\); from pygame_gui.elements import UIStatusBar; print\(''UIStatusBar OK''\)")

Bash(python -c "import pygame_gui; print\(''pygame_gui version:'', pygame_gui.__version__\); from pygame_gui.elements import UIStatusBar; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(UIStatusBar.__init__\)\)")
